detail: Theranos / United States v. Holmes finale topic brief; 'hidden system' = the line between a bold promise and criminal fraud; score 88/100; R3 (living convicted person). Series FINALE flipping the lens from state-vs-you to one-person-vs-everyone. Owner-delegated EP10-15.
Owner delegated EP10-15 topics to Claude. Theranos selected as finale (owner flagged living-person handling). state -> approved with R3 review-required flag.

10 claims (all approved), 4 sources (DOJ Holmes sentencing; DOJ Balwani sentencing; SEC 2018 charges; Wikipedia trial for verdict split). Facts web-verified 2026-06-20 (founded 2003 Holmes/Stanford dropout; ~$9B 2014; WSJ/Carreyrou Oct 2015; SEC Mar 2018 settled no-admission; Jan 3 2022 jury: 4 guilty investor / 4 acquitted patient / 3 hung; Holmes 135mo Nov 2022; Balwani all 12 counts incl. patient, ~155mo). PHRASING locked: acquittal != exoneration; attribute to jury/court. Research QC: warn (hashes pending; R3 legal review pending).

script.en.v001.md (~1,534 words, ~10.2min) + script.annotated.v001.json (24 spans, claim-linked) authored; present-tense; record-based/neutral; series capstone ending + CTA. content_hash sha256:b839847e1f8ad5fe4bdb9b9f59b50e6cd3dca7a1480af14cde2a21dfc0cba31d.

script_qc PASS: no AI-filler, ~10.2min. validate_episode.py PASS (schema 0, dangling 0, span lists consistent, hash match). state -> script_verified. NOTE: R3 — rights_status=review_required; dedicated rights/legal review still required before any publish.

Owner-delegated content sign-off (APR-0001) bound to annotated content_hash. R3: this content sign-off does NOT waive the required pre-publish rights/legal review. Durable source hashes required before publish.
Review-proxy video, thumbnail candidate, rights manifest, youtube metadata draft, and final_delivery prepared. Upload/publish not performed.

note: Prepared exact-hash owner review request for review-proxy video, selected thumbnail, captions, rights manifest, and metadata. No paid API, upload, schedule, or publish action.
Prepared non-active owner approval drafts for first-cut review, title/thumbnail, and future publish/schedule gate. Drafts do not authorize upload, scheduling, public release, or paid API use.

Prepared R3 pre-publish legal/rights review packet with claim wording checks, source recheck status, visual/likeness/logo gates, and exact package hashes. No paid API, upload, schedule, or publish action.

Manifest blockers now explicitly list missing exact-hash owner approvals APR-0002 through APR-0006, including the R3 legal/rights review gate. No APR files were created and no upload, schedule, publish, or paid API action was performed.

Aligned approval_drafts.v001 with active gate numbering: APR-0004 is narration_release, APR-0005 is legal_rights, and APR-0006 is publish_schedule. Added owner approval input template. No APR files were created and no upload, schedule, publish, or paid API action was performed.

Publish/schedule approval text now requires final_delivery.v001.json and its exact SHA-256 before APR-0006 can be prepared. No APR files were created and no upload, schedule, publish, or paid API action was performed.

Finish-design hardened: §1 runtime turned into a binding per-segment second budget summing to ~715s; final runtime band 690-750s (11.5-12.5min) made a non-waivable gate; hook >=25s required. Prevents the EP14-style last-minute hook stretch. NO change to script/claims/shotlist/AI images/narration audio (no re-record, no extra cost). v001 preserved immutable.

Added scripts/check_runtime_band.py (read-only ffprobe) enforcing the 690-750s finished-runtime window. Verified: current review_proxy_v003 (624.96s=10.42min) correctly FAILs (short by 65s) where the old duration_positive-only QC PASSed. No render performed.
